title: agent.user (inbound)
description: Client user turn. Backend-neutral envelope: the daemon hands `message` to the active backend's native input mechanism (Claude: stream-json stdin; Codex: tools/call argument). For Codex sessions, multimodal content arrays are flattened to a single `prompt` string by concatenating text blocks; non-text blocks are rejected with invalid_message. See spec §5.5.
